title: Agency Information Collection Activities: Announcement of Board Approval Under Delegated Authority and Submission to OMB
abstract: The Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System (Board) is adopting a proposal to extend for three years, without revision, the Intermittent Survey of Businesses (FR 1374; OMB No. 7100-0302).
action: On July 16, 2025, the Board published a notice in the Federal Register (90 FR 32008) requesting public comment for 60 days on the extension, without revision, of the FR 1374. The comment period for this notice expired on September 15, 2025. The Board did not receive any comments.
issuing_agency: Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System
section_path: Federal Reserve System > Federal Register > Notice > 2026-00388
title_normalized: Agency Information Collection Activities: Announcement of Board Approval Under Delegated Authority and Submission to OMB
bm25_text: 2026-00388 Agency Information Collection Activities: Announcement of Board Approval Under Delegated Authority and Submission to OMB On July 16, 2025, the Board published a notice in the Federal Register (90 FR 32008) requesting public comment for 60 days on the extension, without revision, of the FR 1374. The comment period for this notice expired on September 15, 2025. The Board did not receive any comments. The Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System (Board) is adopting a proposal to extend for three years, without revision, the Intermittent Survey of Businesses (FR 1374; OMB No. 7100-0302).
